name: libxml-libxml-perl
title: libxml-libxml-perl
summary: Perl interface to the libxml2 library
description:
Perl interface to the libxml2 library
XML::LibXML is a Perl interface to the GNOME libxml2 library, which provides
interfaces for parsing and manipulating XML files. This module allows Perl
programmers to make use of the highly capable validating XML parser and the
high performance Document Object Model (DOM) implementation. Additionally, it
supports using the XML Path Language (XPath) to find and extract information.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxml-libxml-perl because Perl interface to the libxml2 library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxml-libxml-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxml-libxml-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxml-libxml-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
